POC
Discount Update Quotation
script:
recent_discount = frappe.db.get_value(
    "Discount",
    {"opportunity_from": doc.custom_opportunity_from, "customer_name": doc.customer_name, "party": doc.party_name},
    "name",
    order_by="creation desc"
)
a=0
if recent_discount and doc.items:
    dis = frappe.get_doc("Discount", recent_discount)
    if dis.percentage_value > 0:
        discount_amount = doc.items[0].amount * (dis.percentage_value / 100)
        doc.append("items", {
            "item_code": "Discount",
            "item_name": "Discount",
            "qty": 1,
            "uom": "Nos",
            "conversion_factor": 1,
            "rate": -discount_amount,
            "amount": -discount_amount
        })
        doc.run_method("set_missing_values")
        doc.save()

name: Discount Calculation On Quotation
script:
new_items = []
total_qty = 0.0
line_total = 0.0

for row in doc.items:
    if not row.custom_is_discount:
        new_items.append(row)
        qty = row.qty or 0
        rate = row.rate or 0
        total_qty = total_qty + qty
        line_total = line_total + (qty * rate)


doc.items = new_items


if doc.get("custom_discount") and total_qty > 0:
    # Fetch Discount setup
    dc = frappe.get_doc("Discount", doc.custom_discount)
    address_name = dc.address

    
    if dc.discount_from == "Quotation":
        quotation_name = dc.party
        opportunity_name = dc.opportunity  # assuming you store opportunity in discount doc
    elif dc.discount_from == "Opportunity":
        quotation_name = None  # no quotation linked yet
        opportunity_name = dc.party
    else:
        frappe.throw("Invalid value for discount_from in Discount document.")

    discount_calc = frappe.get_doc({
        "doctype": "Discount Calculation",
        "quotation": quotation_name,
        "opportunity": opportunity_name,
        "quantity": total_qty,
        "address": address_name,
    }).insert(ignore_permissions=True)


    discount_value = discount_calc.discount or 0.0

    if discount_value > line_total:
        discount_value = line_total * 0.999


    if discount_value > 0:
        doc.append("items", {
            "item_code": "Discount",
            "item_name": "Discount",
            "qty": 1,
            "rate": -discount_value,
            "amount": -discount_value,
            "uom": "Nos",
            "conversion_factor" : 1,
            "stock_qty" : 1,
            "custom_is_discount": 1,
        })


doc.calculate_taxes_and_totals()

name: Customer auto creation
script:
if not doc.party_name:
    frappe.throw("Quotation must have a Customer Name.")

if not frappe.db.exists("Customer", {"customer_name": doc.customer_name}):
    lead_name = None
    opportunity_name = doc.custom_opportunity_from if doc.custom_opportunity_from else None




    if doc.party_name:
        lead_name = doc.party_name
        if lead_name:
            lead_doc = frappe.get_doc("Lead", lead_name)
            trade_license = lead_doc.custom_trade_license
            vat_certificate = lead_doc.custom_vat_certificate
    if not trade_license or not vat_certificate:
        frappe.throw(str("Please Add Trade Licenese and Vat Certificate in lead"))
    customer = frappe.new_doc("Customer")
    customer.customer_name = doc.customer_name
    customer.custom_transaction_type = "Diesel"
    customer.custom_trade_license = trade_license
    customer.custom_vat_certificate = vat_certificate

    customer.opportunity_name = opportunity_name
    customer.lead_name = lead_name

    customer.save(ignore_permissions=True)
    lead_doc = frappe.get_doc("Lead", lead_name)
    for row in lead_doc.custom_poc:
        contact = frappe.get_doc("Contact",row.contact)

        contact.append("links", {
            "link_doctype": "Customer",
            "link_name": customer.name
        })

        contact.save(ignore_permissions=True)

name: Item Creation at Opportunity Level
script:
# Replicate the Opportunity Value section into the standard items table.
if doc.custom_product:
    qty = doc.custom_expected_monthly_volume or 0
    rate = doc.custom_rate or 0

    existing_row = None
    for item in (doc.items or []):
        if item.item_code == doc.custom_product:
            existing_row = item
            break

    if existing_row:
        existing_row.uom = doc.custom_uom
        existing_row.qty = qty
        existing_row.rate = rate
        existing_row.base_rate = rate
        existing_row.amount = rate * qty
        existing_row.base_amount = rate * qty
    else:
        doc.append("items", {
            "item_code": doc.custom_product,
            "uom": doc.custom_uom,
            "qty": qty,
            "rate": rate,
            "base_rate": rate,
            "amount": rate * qty,
            "base_amount": rate * qty,
        })

    doc.run_method("set_missing_values")

# Recompute the items totals so they reflect the latest rows.
line_total = 0
line_base_total = 0
for it in (doc.items or []):
    line_total += (it.amount or 0)
    line_base_total += (it.base_amount or it.amount or 0)
doc.total = line_total
doc.base_total = line_base_total

name: Calculation
script:
doc.opportunity_amount = (doc.custom_rate or 0) * (doc.custom_expected_monthly_volume or 0)
doc.base_opportunity_amount = doc.opportunity_amount * (doc.conversion_rate or 1)

name: Opportunity Discount Writeback
script:
# Auto-manage a backing Discount document from the Opportunity Discount tab.
if doc.custom_discount_method:
    existing = frappe.db.get_value("Discount", {"party": doc.name}, "name")
    dstatus = frappe.db.get_value("Discount", existing, "docstatus") if existing else None

    if existing and dstatus and dstatus > 0:
        frappe.db.set_value("Discount", existing, {
            "discount_type": doc.custom_discount_method,
            "p_or_v": doc.custom_percentageper_litre,
            "percentage_value": doc.custom_percentage_value,
            "per_litre_value": doc.custom_per_litre_value,
            "threshold_value": doc.custom_max_discount_value,
            "approved": doc.custom_discount_approved,
            "date": doc.custom_discount_upto_date,
            "threshold_days": doc.custom_threshold_days,
            "payment_terms": doc.custom_discount_payment_terms,
        })
    else:
        if existing:
            dc = frappe.get_doc("Discount", existing)
        else:
            dc = frappe.new_doc("Discount")
            dc.party = doc.name
        if doc.opportunity_from == "Customer":
            dc.customer = doc.party_name
        dc.product = doc.custom_product
        dc.company = doc.company
        dc.discount_type = doc.custom_discount_method
        dc.p_or_v = doc.custom_percentageper_litre
        dc.percentage_value = doc.custom_percentage_value
        dc.per_litre_value = doc.custom_per_litre_value
        dc.threshold_value = doc.custom_max_discount_value
        dc.approved = doc.custom_discount_approved
        dc.date = doc.custom_discount_upto_date
        dc.threshold_days = doc.custom_threshold_days
        dc.payment_terms = doc.custom_discount_payment_terms
        dc.set("slab_discount", [])
        for s in (doc.custom_slab_discount or []):
            dc.append("slab_discount", {
                "p_or_v": s.p_or_v,
                "qty_limit": s.qty_limit,
                "discount_value": s.discount_value,
                "threshold_value": s.threshold_value,
                "limit": s.limit,
            })
        dc.save(ignore_permissions=True)

name: Opportunity Send for Finance Dossier
script:
# Create a Finance Dossier (Draft) from an Opportunity, link it, and set the sales stage.
opp_name = frappe.form_dict.get("opportunity")
doc = frappe.get_doc("Opportunity", opp_name)

doc_count = frappe.db.count("Business Documentation",
    {"reference_doctype": "Opportunity", "reference_name": doc.name})
if not doc_count:
    frappe.throw("Please upload at least one document before creating a Finance Dossier.")

existing = frappe.get_all("Finance Dossier",
    filters={"finance_dossier_from": "Opportunity", "id": doc.name, "docstatus": ["<", 2]},
    pluck="name")

if existing:
    fdname = existing[0]
else:
    fd = frappe.new_doc("Finance Dossier")
    fd.finance_dossier_from = "Opportunity"
    fd.id = doc.name
    fd.address = doc.custom_customer_billing_address
    fd.expected_monthly_volume = doc.custom_expected_monthly_volume
    fd.deal_type = doc.custom_deal_type
    fd.pricing_model = doc.custom_pricing_model
    fd.payment_term = doc.custom_payment_terms
    fd.contract_expiry = doc.custom_contract_expiry
    fd.invoicing_frequency = doc.custom_invoicing_frequency
    fd.invoicing_type = doc.custom_invoicing_type
    fd.discount = frappe.db.get_value("Discount", {"party": doc.name}, "name")
    fd.discount_method = doc.custom_discount_method
    fd.percentageper_litre = doc.custom_percentageper_litre
    fd.percentage_value = doc.custom_percentage_value
    fd.per_litre_value = doc.custom_per_litre_value
    fd.max_discount_value = doc.custom_max_discount_value
    for s in (doc.custom_slab_discount or []):
        fd.append("slab_discount", {
            "p_or_v": s.p_or_v, "qty_limit": s.qty_limit,
            "discount_value": s.discount_value, "threshold_value": s.threshold_value,
            "limit": s.limit,
        })
    fd.insert(ignore_permissions=True)   # stays Draft (no submit)
    fdname = fd.name

frappe.db.set_value("Opportunity", doc.name, "sales_stage", "Send for Finance Dossier")
frappe.flags["created_finance_dossier"] = fdname

name: Opportunity Send for Quotation
script:
# Create a Quotation (Draft) from an Opportunity, link it, and set the sales stage.
opp_name = frappe.form_dict.get("opportunity")
doc = frappe.get_doc("Opportunity", opp_name)

existing = frappe.get_all("Quotation",
    filters={"custom_opportunity_from": doc.name, "docstatus": ["<", 2]}, pluck="name")

if existing:
    qname = existing[0]
else:
    d_method = doc.custom_discount_method
    d_p_or_v = doc.custom_percentageper_litre
    d_pct = doc.custom_percentage_value or 0
    d_per_litre = doc.custom_per_litre_value or 0
    d_cap = doc.custom_max_discount_value or 0
    d_slabs = doc.custom_slab_discount or []

    quotation = frappe.new_doc("Quotation")
    quotation.quotation_to = doc.opportunity_from
    quotation.party_name = doc.party_name
    quotation.company = doc.company
    quotation.currency = doc.currency
    quotation.order_type = "Sales"
    quotation.ignore_pricing_rule = 1
    quotation.custom_opportunity_from = doc.name
    quotation.valid_till = doc.custom_contract_expiry
    quotation.customer_address = doc.custom_customer_billing_address
    quotation.custom_deal_type = doc.custom_deal_type
    quotation.custom_contract_expiry = doc.custom_contract_expiry
    quotation.custom_pricing_model = doc.custom_pricing_model
    quotation.custom_discount_type = frappe.db.get_value("Discount", {"party": doc.name}, "name")
    quotation.custom_payment_terms = doc.custom_payment_terms
    quotation.custom_invoicing_frequency = doc.custom_invoicing_frequency
    quotation.custom_invoicing_type = doc.custom_invoicing_type

    rows = []
    for it in (doc.items or []):
        rows.append((it.item_code, it.qty or 0, it.uom, it.rate or 0))
    if not rows and doc.custom_product:
        rows.append((doc.custom_product, doc.custom_expected_monthly_volume or 0,
                     doc.custom_uom, doc.custom_rate or 0))

    for item_code, qty, uom, base_rate in rows:
        discount_amount = 0
        if d_method and qty and qty > 0 and base_rate:
            if d_method == "Non-Slab Discount":
                if d_p_or_v == "Per Litre":
                    discount_amount = qty * d_per_litre
                elif d_p_or_v == "Percentage":
                    discount_amount = qty * (d_pct / 100.0 * base_rate)
                    if d_cap and discount_amount > d_cap:
                        discount_amount = d_cap
            elif d_method == "Slab Discount":
                prev = 0
                for slab in d_slabs:
                    hit_upper = slab.limit == "Upper" and prev < qty and qty <= slab.qty_limit
                    hit_lower = slab.limit == "Lower" and prev < qty
                    if hit_upper or hit_lower:
                        if slab.p_or_v == "Per Litre":
                            discount_amount = qty * (slab.discount_value or 0)
                        else:
                            discount_amount = qty * ((slab.discount_value or 0) / 100.0 * base_rate)
                            if slab.threshold_value and discount_amount > slab.threshold_value:
                                discount_amount = slab.threshold_value
                        break
                    prev = slab.qty_limit
        per_litre_discount = (discount_amount / qty) if qty else 0
        rate = base_rate - per_litre_discount
        if rate < 0:
            rate = 0
        quotation.append("items", {
            "item_code": item_code, "qty": qty, "uom": uom,
            "rate": rate, "price_list_rate": rate,
        })

    quotation.taxes_and_charges = "UAE VAT 5%"
    template = frappe.get_doc("Sales Taxes and Charges Template", "UAE VAT 5%")
    for t in template.taxes:
        quotation.append("taxes", {
            "charge_type": t.charge_type, "account_head": t.account_head,
            "description": t.description, "rate": t.rate,
            "cost_center": t.cost_center, "included_in_print_rate": t.included_in_print_rate,
        })

    quotation.insert(ignore_permissions=True)   # stays Draft (no submit)
    qname = quotation.name

frappe.db.set_value("Opportunity", doc.name, "sales_stage", "Send for Quotation")
frappe.flags["created_quotation"] = qname

name: Quotation Status to Opportunity
